omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
Usage Data
Inputs by Users on the Website/Application
Data regarding pages or profiles visited, time spent on a page,
navigation through the portal, location, language preference,
search actions, participation in contests, interaction with other
Users, including time and date of all such actions

API Calls: API Calls consists of data generated when a User
performs an activity on the Website/Application such as
navigating to different pages, clicking on buttons, reading content
etc. This data is collected and used by Company and may be
shared with authorized third parties as described in this Privacy
Policy.
